title: girls trip to istanbul | turkish food, thrifting & exploring the city
description: Hello my dear people! I'm so excited to share this vlog with you guys because this was my first time in Turkey and the trip was absolutely incredible!! Matthea and I have been wanting to visit Istanbul for some time and we decided to finally make it happen! This city turned out to be so charming and we had so much fun exploring the different parts of the city, trying traditional Turkish food, and best of all, pet all of the cute kittens around the city hehe!
